# Scenario: inspect-summary-tty
# Invocation: `/inspect` with active session ses_01HXYZABCDEF01, active turn turn_01HXYZABCDEFT1.
# Default tab is "summary". Priority order (Phase 1 Workstream 5 / Phase 4 Workstream 4):
#   1. prompt
#   2. reviewed outcome
#   3. next action
#   4. attempt + sandbox id
#   5. artifact summary
#   6. approvals / provenance summary
#   7. raw-log entry points
# frame.mode = "transcript" while overlay is visible; composer is hidden.

\e[36m\e[1mInspect\e[0m  \e[2msession ses_01HXYZ…F01 / turn 1\e[0m  \e[1m[summary]\e[0m provenance  review  artifacts  approvals  logs

\e[1mPrompt:\e[0m
  add a richer review surface for sandbox results

\e[1mOutcome:\e[0m
  \e[32maccepted\e[0m

\e[1mNext:\e[0m
  none

\e[1mAttempt:\e[0m
  attempt_01HXYZABCDEFA1  standard  succeeded

\e[1mSandbox:\e[0m
  task bakudo-ses_01HXYZABCDEF01-t1-a1

\e[1mArtifacts:\e[0m
  - result.json
  - worker-output.log
  - dispatch.json
  - patch.diff

\e[1mApprovals:\e[0m
  dispatch auto_approved (agent=standard, autopilot=false)

\e[1mLogs:\e[0m
  /inspect logs         raw worker event stream
  /inspect provenance   compiled attempt spec + abox dispatch
  /inspect retry        transition chain (if any)

\e[33m[provenance] [review] [artifacts] [approvals] [logs] [q]uit\e[0m
